name: Wellness Journey Steps
prompt_context: A section illustrating the step-by-step process of a mental health journey or service onboarding. Features numbered steps with images and descriptions. The tone is encouraging and structured.

content_schema.h2: string (Section title, e.g. 'Your Mental Wellness Journey')
content_schema.description: string (Short intro about the process, max 20 words)

steps.title: string (Step title, e.g. 'First Insight')
steps.description: string (Detailed explanation of the step, max 20 words)

image_hints: Select images that show progression, planning, or milestones: notebooks, nature paths, smiling faces, structured environments.
